mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO byai_files ( file_id, file_name, content_type, length, file_url, file_type, file_md5, file_system_type, upload_date, create_by ) VALUES
( #{item.fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.length,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileMd5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileSystemType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.uploadDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
